title: Neon Texture Pack
description: Minecraft Crystal PVP/Sword PVP Texture Pack.
body:
# ✨ Neon – PvP Texture Pack

Bring your gameplay to life with **Neon**, a stylish and vibrant PvP texture pack designed for crystal, totem, and combat lovers. ⚔️💥

## 🌌 Features

* **Neon-themed weapons & tools** – sharp, clean, and glowing blades ⚡
* **Custom armor sets** – Diamond & Netherite with neon outlines 💎🟪
* **Enhanced crystals & obsidian** – perfect for crystal PvP 💣
* **Custom totem** – unique glowing design 🟧
* **Clean UI & hotbar** – easier item management and better visibility 🎯
* **Optimized for PvP** – smooth visuals, no unnecessary clutter 🧪

## 🎮 Perfect For

* Crystal PvP
* Multiplayer servers
* Combat-focused gameplay
* Players who love clean & glowing neon aesthetics ✨
